title: [Record candidate] TTT Peer-LoRA Ensemble on PR #2014, val_bpb = 1.05749
author: varunneal

data.description: Peer-LoRA ensembling during test-time training evaluation, blending own and peer predictions on uncertain tokens using predictive entropy routing.
Target-free confidence routing based on predictive entropy to decide when to use ensemble predictions.

novel_contributions: Introduced peer-LoRA ensembling into the TTT evaluation loop
Used target-free predictive-entropy routing to blend own and peer predictions
Tuned per-doc LoRA learning rate and weight decay to improve the baseline
Built on PR #2014 with doc-independent LoRAs
